name: pdf-resume
description: A Chrome and Brave extension that remembers reading position in local PDFs.

scripts.lint: node --check background.js && node --check viewer/viewer-entry.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-boot.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-url.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-view.mjs && node --check scripts/check-format.mjs && node --check test/extension-contract.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test
